summary: Completed comprehensive e-commerce application testing. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend displays products correctly on homepage with 16 deal products, but product listing page shows loading issues. Core shopping flow from homepage works well.

backend_issues.notes: All 26 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate including cart operations, order creation, payment processing, and order tracking

ui_bugs.issue: Shows '0 products found' and loading spinner despite API returning 29 products

integration_issues.issue: Products don't display on dedicated /products page but work fine on homepage

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and categories
Flash Deals section displays 16 products correctly
Search functionality working with proper URL params
Header cart button and mobile menu present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix product list page loading issue - products load correctly on homepage but not on /products page despite API working correctly. Check ProductListPage component's useEffect and API call logic.
